misconfig_patterns: Operator deploys with no admin signup completed (fresh install, 0 projects)
Operator runs --no-auth or LABEL_STUDIO_DISABLE_SIGNUP=true for internal demos
Labeled training data exposure via /api/projects/{id}/export when unauth

active_probe.false_positive_check:
IMPORTANT: /version body is wrapped in 
...
HTML; strip wrapper before json.loads or the probe falsely returns dead

deployment_tells: Modern operators on 1.20+; long-tail on 1.13.1 and 1.15.0
Cloud spread: AWS / GCP / Hetzner / Alibaba / Tencent (no operator concentration)
/version JSON wrapped in <pre> HTML (Django default rendering)
pivot_paths: GET /api/projects/ -> list project NAMES, counts, members_count
vulnerabilities: Operator-side: --no-auth mode and shared default admin creds
sources: case-studies/commercial/label-studio-population-survey-2026-06-08.md (1/500 unauth = 0.2%, the strongest auth-on-default measurement in the program)
